reason: Genuine intro framing path collections and walker queues, useful context.

Continuation of the connectivity constraint; small but carries a real rule.
Path-completeness constraint, genuine semantic content.

Declarative-traversal rationale, distinct from earlier intent chunk.

Core walker traversal semantics: destination queue definition and FIFO processing model.

The formal visit-statement semantics (visit appends to Q_w), central to OSP mechanics.
Short but states the adaptive-traversal consequence of visit, keeps the sequence coherent.
Automatic edge-to-node transition rule, genuine traversal semantics.

expandPath formula for visiting a path collection, load-bearing for the surrounding prose.

The four guarantees of path expansion, genuine content.
States the intent of implicit intermediate-step insertion, non-redundant.
Spawn/active-state lifecycle and queue-exhaustion semantics, core walker mechanics.

Defines abilities and the data-to-computation inversion, foundational OSP concept.

Walker ability semantics including self/here/path access, core entry/exit mechanics.
Node ability semantics with self/visitor access, core to nodes as active computation sites.
Edge ability semantics, completes the ability-trigger model with visitor/self access.

Second step of arrival-phase ordering, real content continuing the rule.

Departure-phase ordering step two, real content.
